You Will Die in 6 Hours

6시간 후 너는 죽는다

6.2
2024MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Jung-yoon was approached by a random stranger named Jun-woo, who told her she'd be dead in six hours. As she follows him for answers, she begins to question whether he's her savior or the one trying to put her in danger.

Tags

prophecy
